title: Australian Beef Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and tender beef stir fry dish originating from Australia, featuring a mix of savory and sweet notes.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of stir-fry oil to the skillet.
Add the bell peppers and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the australian oregano and cook for 1 minute.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir in the salty soy sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the beef is coated in the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
